reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/verse from the Quran (Surah Al-Hashr) that asks for forgiveness and removal of hatred from hearts. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: ربنا اغفر لنا ولإخواننا الذين سبقونا بالإيمان ولا تجعل في قلوبنا غلا للذين آمنوا ربنا إنك رءوف رحيم -- سورة الحشر
